name: $200 Airline Fee Credit
description: Up to $200 in statement credits per calendar year for incidental airline fees (checked bags, seat upgrades, in-flight food/drinks) on one selected qualifying airline.

name: $200 Hotel Credit
description: Up to $200 in statement credits per calendar year for prepaid bookings at Fine Hotels + Resorts or The Hotel Collection (minimum 2-night stay) through American Express Travel.

name: $20 Digital Entertainment Credit
description: Up to $20 per month in statement credits for eligible digital entertainment subscriptions including Disney+, Hulu, ESPN+, Peacock, The New York Times, and others.

name: $12.95 Walmart+ Credit
description: Monthly statement credit covering the cost of a Walmart+ membership ($12.95/month). Must use card to pay for Walmart+ directly.

name: $15 Uber Cash
description: Up to $15 in Uber Cash per month for Uber rides or Uber Eats orders in the US. Bonus $20 in December, making that month worth up to $35.

name: $50 Saks Fifth Avenue Credit
description: Up to $50 in statement credits at Saks Fifth Avenue per semiannual period (Jan–Jun and Jul–Dec).

name: $300 Equinox Credit
description: Up to $300 per calendar year in statement credits for eligible Equinox memberships or Equinox+ digital subscriptions.

name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
description: Up to $100 statement credit for Global Entry application fee (every 4.5 years) or up to $85 for TSA PreCheck. Credit available once every 4 years per cardmember year.

name: Centurion Lounge Access
description: Unlimited complimentary access to American Express Centurion Lounges for cardmember and up to two guests. Guest access may require spending threshold.

name: Priority Pass Select
description: Complimentary Priority Pass Select membership providing access to 1,300+ airport lounges worldwide. Enrollment required through the Amex benefits portal.

name: Delta Sky Club Access
description: Up to 10 complimentary visits per year to Delta Sky Club lounges when flying Delta. Visits above 10 cost $50 each.

name: $189 CLEAR Plus Credit
description: Up to $189 per calendar year in statement credits for a CLEAR Plus membership, which provides expedited security at participating airports and venues.

name: Global Dining Access
description: Access to Global Dining Access by Resy, providing priority access, exclusive reservations, and unique dining experiences at top restaurants worldwide.

name: Marriott Bonvoy Gold Elite Status
description: Complimentary Marriott Bonvoy Gold Elite status, providing 25% bonus points, late checkout when available, and room upgrades when available.

name: Hilton Honors Gold Status
description: Complimentary Hilton Honors Gold status, providing 80% bonus points, space-available room upgrades, and daily F&B credit at full-service hotels.

name: $300 Travel Credit
description: Up to $300 in statement credits per cardmember year for bookings made through Capital One Travel portal.

name: 10,000 Anniversary Miles
description: 10,000 bonus miles awarded on each account anniversary, worth approximately $100 in travel. Miles are credited automatically.

name: Priority Pass Select
description: Complimentary unlimited Priority Pass Select membership for cardmember and up to 2 authorized users, providing access to 1,300+ lounges worldwide.

name: Capital One Lounge Access
description: Unlimited complimentary access to Capital One Lounges for cardmember plus 2 guests per visit. Locations in Dallas, Denver, and Dulles.

name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
description: Up to $100 credit for Global Entry application fee (covers 4-year membership) or up to $85 for TSA PreCheck.

name: $300 Annual Travel Credit
description: Up to $300 in statement credits per cardmember year for travel purchases. Applies automatically to a wide range of travel categories including airlines, hotels, rideshare, and more.

name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
description: Up to $100 application fee credit for Global Entry (every 4 years) or up to $85 for TSA PreCheck.

name: Priority Pass Select
description: Complimentary Priority Pass Select membership with unlimited visits for cardmember plus 2 guests per visit at 1,300+ lounges worldwide.

name: $5 Monthly DoorDash Credit
description: Up to $5 per month in DashPass credits for DoorDash orders. Requires DashPass membership and enrollment through Chase.

name: $10 Monthly Lyft Credit
description: Up to $10 in Lyft credits per month when paying with your Chase Sapphire Reserve card.

name: $120 Peloton Credit
description: Up to $120 per year in statement credits for eligible Peloton App or All-Access Membership purchases.

name: Chase Dining Access
description: Access to Chase Dining powered by Tock for exclusive reservations, culinary experiences, and priority seating at top restaurants.

name: Admirals Club Membership
description: Full Admirals Club membership for cardmember and up to 2 guests or immediate family traveling with you. Access to all Admirals Club and partner lounges.

name: First Checked Bag Free
description: First checked bag free for cardmember and up to 8 companions on the same reservation when flying American Airlines.

name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
description: Up to $100 credit for Global Entry application fee or up to $85 for TSA PreCheck, once every 5 years.

name: 10,000 Elite Qualifying Miles
description: Earn 10,000 Elite Qualifying Miles (EQMs) after spending $40,000 on purchases in a cardmember year, helping toward AAdvantage elite status.

name: Priority Boarding & Check-In
description: Priority check-in, security screening (where available), and priority boarding for cardmember and up to 8 companions on the same reservation.

name: $300 Travel Credit
description: Up to $300 in statement credits per cardmember year for travel purchases booked through Citi Travel or directly with airlines and hotels.

name: Priority Pass Select
description: Complimentary Priority Pass Select membership for unlimited lounge access at 1,300+ lounges worldwide.

name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
description: Up to $100 application fee credit for Global Entry or up to $85 for TSA PreCheck.

name: $100 Hotel Savings Benefit
description: Up to $100 discount on a hotel stay of 2+ nights when booked through Citi Travel.

name: ThankYou Points Travel Redemption Boost
description: Earn 1 ThankYou Point per dollar on all purchases plus boosted earnings on travel and hotel categories. Points transfer to 15+ airline and hotel partners.

name: Companion Certificate
description: One companion certificate each cardmember year after renewal. Valid for a companion to travel on a domestic main cabin round-trip ticket purchased with the card.

name: Delta Sky Club Access
description: Up to 15 complimentary Delta Sky Club visits per year. Additional visits cost $50 each. Unlimited access if spending $75,000+ in a calendar year.

name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
description: Up to $100 statement credit for Global Entry application fee or up to $85 for TSA PreCheck.

name: First Checked Bag Free
description: First checked bag free for cardmember and up to 8 companions on the same reservation when flying Delta.

name: $10 Monthly Rideshare Credit
description: Up to $10 per month in statement credits for U.S. rideshare purchases (Uber, Lyft, etc.).

name: MQD Earn Boost
description: Earn Medallion Qualification Dollars (MQDs) on purchases: $1 MQD per $10 spent on Delta, $1 MQD per $20 on all other purchases. Helps qualify for Medallion status.

name: $200 Airline Fee Credit
description: Up to $200 in airline fee credits per semiannual period (Jan–Jun and Jul–Dec). Select one qualifying airline per calendar year.

name: $200 Hilton Resort Credit
description: Up to $200 in resort credits per quarter at participating Hilton Resorts. Applies automatically to eligible resort charges.

name: $100 Hilton On-Property Credit
description: Up to $100 in property credits per stay when booking a 2-night minimum stay through Hilton.com or the Hilton app.

name: Free Night Reward Certificate
description: One free night reward certificate each cardmember year. Can be used at most Hilton properties worldwide. Additional free night for spending $60,000+ per year.

name: Hilton Diamond Status
description: Complimentary Hilton Honors Diamond status as long as card is held. Includes daily breakfast or F&B credit, room upgrades, executive lounge access, and 100% bonus points.

name: Priority Pass Select
description: Complimentary Priority Pass Select membership for unlimited lounge access at 1,300+ lounges worldwide.

name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
description: Up to $100 application fee credit for Global Entry or up to $85 for TSA PreCheck.

name: $25 Monthly Dining Credit
description: Up to $25 per month in statement credits for restaurant purchases worldwide (excludes cafes, bars, and fast food at many properties).

name: Free Night Award Certificate
description: One free night award certificate each cardmember year redeemable at hotels costing up to 85,000 Marriott Bonvoy points per night.

name: Priority Pass Select
description: Complimentary Priority Pass Select membership for unlimited lounge access at 1,300+ lounges worldwide.

name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
description: Up to $100 application fee credit for Global Entry or up to $85 for TSA PreCheck.

name: Marriott Bonvoy Platinum Elite Status
description: Complimentary Marriott Bonvoy Platinum Elite status. Includes lounge access, room upgrades, enhanced Wi-Fi, and 50% bonus points on stays.

name: $100 Marriott On-Property Credit
description: Up to $100 in property credits per stay when booking a 2-night minimum directly with participating Marriott Bonvoy properties.

name: United Club Membership
description: Full United Club membership for cardmember and immediate family (spouse/domestic partner and children under 21) or up to 2 adult guests traveling with cardmember.

name: First & Second Checked Bag Free
description: First and second checked bags free for cardmember and one companion on the same reservation when flying United.

name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
description: Up to $100 application fee credit for Global Entry or up to $85 for TSA PreCheck.

name: Premier Access & Upgrades
description: Priority check-in, security screening, boarding, and baggage handling. Complimentary Premier Upgrades on United-operated flights when available.

name: Premier Qualifying Points Boost
description: Earn 25 Premier Qualifying Points (PQPs) for every $500 spent on purchases, up to 1,000 PQPs per year toward United MileagePlus elite status.
